name: amplion
description: Lightweight ADHD friendly YouTube music player

scripts.start: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bun run build:renderer && electron .
scripts.dev: bunx concurrently "bun run dev:renderer" "bun run dev:main" "bun run dev:preload" "bun run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:preload: bunx concurrently "bunx esbuild src/preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --external:electron --format=cjs --outfile=build/preload/preload.js --watch" "bunx esbuild src/settings-preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --external:electron --format=cjs --outfile=build/settings-preload/settings-preload.js --watch"
scripts.build:preload: bunx esbuild src/preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --external:electron --format=cjs --outfile=build/preload/preload.js && bunx esbuild src/settings-preload/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --external:electron --format=cjs --outfile=build/settings-preload/settings-preload.js
scripts.build:renderer: VITE_BUILD_MODE=index vite build && VITE_BUILD_MODE=settings vite build
scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bun run build:renderer && electron-builder
